calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2008 Continued To Oct-03-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-14-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: August 14, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

J. Michael Phelps, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Park Persidio Bible Church, formely known as Park Presidio Baptist Church of San Francisco California, and Bay View Bible Church.
No appearance by defendants Anne J. White or All Persons Claiming any Legal or Equitable Right, Title, Estate, Lien, or Interest in the Real Property Described in the Complaint Herein Adverse to Plaintiffs' Title, or any Cloud on Plaintiffs' Title Thereto.
Stipulation for Entry of Judgment was entered against defendant Anne J. White on March 10, 2008.
Default entered against defendants All Persons Claiming any Legal or Equitable Right, Title, Estate, Lien, or Interest in the Real Property Described in the Complaint Herein Adverse to Plaintiffs' Title, or any Cloud on Plaintiffs' Title Thereto today, August 14, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good causethe Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

All Persons Claiming any Legal or Equitable Right, Title, Estate, Lien, or Interest in the Real Property Described in the Complaint Herein Adverse to Plaintiffs' Title, or any Cloud on Plaintiffs' Title Thereto are enjoined from making any further claim to 1429 Mendell Street (Lot 15) adverse to that of plaintiff Park Persidio Buble Church (formely known as Park Presidio Baptist Church of San Francisco California) by legal action or otherwise, on the basis of any fact of facts that were asserted, or which minght have been asserted or proved, in the instant action.

Each party shall bear its pwn attorneys' fees and costs incurred herein.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
